sum: This mod provides 2 different versions of chapter 6. Returning to Candlekeep becomes a secondary quest without involving the Iron Throne.
no: This mod provides 2 different versions of chapter 6. Returning to Candlekeep becomes a secondary quest without involving the Iron Throne.
